title: The Black Box Problem
concept: Explainability aims to make the complex decision-making of deep neural networks understandable to humans.

exercises.prompt: Recap: What is early fusion in sensor fusion?

options.text: Combining raw data from multiple sensors into a single input tensor before running the neural network
Averaging the final confidence scores of separate models
Deleting camera inputs early to save GPU memory

exercises.explain: Early fusion concatenates raw sensor data at the input layer, allowing the model to learn combined spatial-color representations.

cards.title: Trusting the machine
cards.body: If an AI flags a medical scan and says 'this patient has a tumor with 99% probability', a surgeon cannot simply operate without checking. They need to know *why* the model made that decision. In this unit, we look inside the black box of deep neural networks.

cards.title: Model Explainability
cards.body: Model Explainability (or interpretability) is the suite of techniques used to explain the decisions of machine learning models to humans, mapping complex weight math to understandable visual cues.

cards.title: The Silent Detective
cards.body: Imagine a detective who solves every case instantly, pointing to a suspect and saying 'they did it'. But when you ask how they know, they refuse to speak. You wouldn't trust them in court. Explainability forces the silent detective to show their evidence.

cards.title: Medical Validation
cards.body: A lung X-ray model detects pneumonia. Using explainability tools, the radiologist views a heatmap overlay showing that the model focused on the lung tissue consolidation rather than a random text tag on the corner of the film.

cards.title: High accuracy does not guarantee safety
cards.body: You might think a model with 99% accuracy is safe. But if it achieved that score by looking at the specific hospital scanner logo in the corner rather than the actual patient's symptoms, it will fail on other scanners. Explainability reveals these cheats.

left.text:
Input: X-ray -> Output: 95% cancer.
No reasoning provided.
Risk: High chance of hidden bias.

right.text:
Input: X-ray -> Output: 95% cancer.
Heatmap highlights tumor location.
Result: Surgeon can verify and trust.

exercises.prompt: What is the primary goal of model explainability in deep learning?
exercises.explain: Explainability aims to explain how neural networks make decisions, building trust and helping developers debug.

options.text: To make the decision-making process of complex models transparent and understandable to humans
To speed up the training time of neural networks on GPUs
To automatically correct wrong predictions without human oversight
To convert model weights into compressed binary formats

exercises.prompt: True or False: A model can achieve very high test accuracy by relying on misleading background shortcuts.
exercises.explain: True. Models are lazy optimizer loops; they exploit any shortcut (like a watermark or background color) to minimize training loss.
Deep neural networks are called black-box models because their billions of parameters are hard for humans to interpret directly.
exercises.sentence: A neural network whose inner decision logic is hidden from developers is called a ___ model.

exercises.prompt: Which of these is a benefit of explainable AI?
exercises.explain: Explainability overlays expose the features a model prioritizes, revealing if it is relying on shortcut cheats.

options.text: Helping developers identify and debug systematic biases and shortcut learning
Reducing the total number of layers in a convolutional network
Increasing the frame rate of real-time camera streams

exercises.prompt: You deploy an autonomous loan-approval camera that scans customer ID cards. Why is explainability critical here?

options.text: To ensure the model is not relying on biased shortcuts (like zip codes or photo styles) to make credit decisions, and to comply with auditing regulations.
To double the speed at which customer photos are loaded into GPU memory.
To prove that the model weights are encrypted.
To automatically adjust the customer's loan interest rate.

exercises.explain: In high-stakes decisions like credit or medical screening, explainability ensures fair, unbiased operations and meets legal accountability guidelines.
